# Configure News

> Configure News (configure.news) is a B2B SaaS AI-powered social media automation platform that generates and publishes content across 10 social media platforms using autonomous AI agents, brand voice training, AI video generation, and trend-driven content intelligence.

## Overview

Configure News automates the entire social media content lifecycle: from trending topic discovery and AI content generation to multi-platform publishing and performance analytics. It serves businesses, marketers, agencies, and content creators who need to maintain an active social media presence across multiple platforms without manual effort.

The platform is accessible at https://configure.news

## Core Capabilities

### AI Content Generation
- Generates platform-optimized social media posts using AI
- Adapts content tone, length, and format per platform (e.g., Twitter character limits, LinkedIn professional tone, Reddit community style)
- Trending news aggregation and topic relevance analysis
- Content deduplication to prevent repeated posts across schedules
- Image extraction from source articles for visual content

### AI Agents System
- Autonomous per-platform content publishing entities
- Each agent manages its own publishing schedule, content style, and platform connection
- Agents can be configured with specific topics, tones, and posting frequencies
- Test agents with a single post before enabling full automation
- Per-agent performance tracking and quota consumption
- Free tier: 1 agent | Starter: 2 agents | Growth: 5 agents | Business: unlimited agents

### Brand Voice Service
- Train the AI on your existing writing style and brand guidelines
- Generates brand-consistent content that matches your voice across all platforms
- Learns from your past content to improve alignment over time
- Media learning via LoRA training for visual brand consistency

### AI Video Generation
- Create AI-generated short-form videos for TikTok and YouTube using Flux2-Pro
- Intelligent video prompt generation engine
- Thumbnail generation from video content
- Video quotas per tier: Free: 0 | Starter: 2/month | Growth: 10/month | Business: 30/month

### Advanced Analytics Dashboard
- Overview KPIs: total posts, active platforms, success rate, engagement
- Per-platform and per-agent performance metrics
- Content insights: topic performance, tone effectiveness, timing analysis
- Optimal posting time recommendations
- Connection health monitoring and token expiration alerts
- Data export in JSON/CSV (Business tier)
- Marketing and affiliate analytics (with respective add-ons)

### Trend Analysis
- AI-powered trend detection across news sources and social media
- Topic relevance scoring for your niche
- Automatic content suggestions based on trending subjects
- Geo-filtering support for location-specific trends

### Automation Engine
- Configurable automation schedules (morning, lunch, evening, night)
- Posts-per-day settings limited by subscription tier
- Topic selection, keyword filtering, and tone/voice settings
- Pause/resume automation on demand
- Daily limit enforcement

## Supported Platforms (10)

1. **Twitter/X** - Text and media posts, conversation threading, Premium tier detection
2. **LinkedIn** - Professional content, organization posting, article sharing
3. **Reddit** - Community-aware posting with subreddit flair management and requirements
4. **Facebook** - Page posting with Meta Business API (coming soon to UI)
5. **Instagram** - Image and video posts via Meta container publishing (coming soon to UI)
6. **Threads** - Text, image, and video with separate OAuth (coming soon to UI)
7. **Telegram** - Bot API integration with group management
8. **WhatsApp** - Self-hosted bridge integration with group distribution
9. **TikTok** - AI-generated short-form video content
10. **YouTube** - Video publishing with thumbnail generation

## Add-On Modules

### Marketing Pro+ ($19/month per ad account)
- Meta Ads campaign management for Facebook and Instagram
- Create, manage, and monitor advertising campaigns
- Post boosting with configurable budgets
- Auto-boost rules triggered by engagement thresholds (e.g., auto-promote posts exceeding performance metrics)
- Reusable audience templates with age, location, and interest targeting
- Audience reach estimation
- Marketing analytics dashboard with spend and ROI tracking
- Campaign sync with Meta API

### AliExpress Affiliate Integration
- Product search and hot products discovery
- Smart product-to-content matching
- Automated affiliate product posting to social platforms
- Keyword management for product discovery
- Revenue and engagement tracking
- Supports WhatsApp, Telegram, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, Instagram, Threads

## Subscription Tiers

### Free ($0/month)
- 1 post per week
- 0 video generations
- 1 AI agent
- 9 platforms (text only)
- 7-day analytics window
- Basic posting features

### Starter ($25/month)
- 6 posts per day (180/month)
- 2 videos per month
- 2 AI agents
- All 10 platforms
- Image extraction enabled
- Post scheduling
- Brand Voice access
- 30-day analytics
- Email support

### Growth ($75/month)
- 12 posts per day (360/month)
- 10 videos per month
- 5 AI agents
- All 10 platforms
- Content insights and timing optimization
- Advanced analytics
- Brand Voice access
- 30-day analytics

### Business ($250/month)
- 30 posts per day (900/month)
- 30 videos per month
- Unlimited AI agents
- All 10 platforms
- White-label options
- Webhook integrations
- Custom analytics with unlimited retention
- Full data export (JSON/CSV)
- Priority support
- API access

## Additional Features

- **Live Feed**: Cross-user showcase of published posts for inspiration and discovery
- **Built-in Support Chat**: In-app support system with conversation tracking and category routing
- **Content Scheduling**: Time-based publishing with optimal timing recommendations
- **OAuth 2.0 Security**: Secure platform connections with AES-256-GCM token encryption
- **Multi-Account Support**: Connect multiple accounts per platform
- **Per-Use Purchases**: Micro-transactions for additional image generation and video generation credits

## Technical Details

- Web-based SaaS application (no installation required)
- Works on all modern browsers, responsive design with PWA support
- Express.js backend with Supabase PostgreSQL database
- Hosted on Render cloud infrastructure
- Dual payment infrastructure (Lemon Squeezy / Paddle)
- Background worker system for automation scheduling and content generation

- Pricing: https://configure.news/payment.html
- Blog: https://configure.news/blog/
